front: What is mRNA display and how does it differ from phage display?
back: mRNA display links mRNA to its encoded protein via puromycin. Advantages over phage: 1) Larger library (10^12-10^14), 2) No cell transformation bottleneck, 3) Can include non-natural amino acids, 4) In vitro selection faster. Used for: aptamer discovery, protein-protein interactions, peptide macrocycles.
